chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-73 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 12-03-2024 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G. ***** Petitioner present in person does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
